content: ### Task 3.2: Implement `MisplacedDoc` check¥n¥nuse corvia_common::config::DocsRulesConfig;¥n¥nfn check_misplaced_doc(¥n    entries: &[KnowledgeEntry],¥n    rules: &DocsRulesConfig,¥n) -> Vec<Finding> {¥n    // Pre-compile glob patterns¥n    let blocked: Vec<glob::Pattern> = rules.blocked_paths.iter()¥n        .filter_map(|p| glob::Pattern::new(p).ok())¥n        .collect();¥n¥n    let mut findings = Vec::new();¥n    for entry in entries {¥n        let Some(ref source_file) = entry.metadata.source_file else { continue };¥n        for pattern in &blocked {¥n            if pattern.matches(source_file) {¥n                findings.push(Finding::new(¥n                    CheckType::MisplacedDoc,¥n                    &entry.scope_id,¥n                    vec![entry.id],¥n                    1.0,¥n                    format!(¥

, source_file, pattern),¥n                ));¥n            }¥n        }¥n    }¥n    findings¥n}¥n```¥n¥n- [ ] **Step 3: Run test, verify pass**¥n¥nRun: `cd /workspaces/corvia-workspace/repos/corvia && cargo test -p corvia-kernel test_misplaced_doc -- --nocapture`¥n¥n- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**¥n¥n```bash¥ncd /workspaces/corvia-workspace/repos/corvia¥ngit add crates/corvia-kernel/src/reasoner.rs¥ngit commit -m ¥
